subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! Thy letter was received and brought most joyous tidings that Ardishír, like honey and milk [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه شما رسید و بشارت کلی داشت که جناب اردشیر چون شهد و شیر
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @importance of community building, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @consultation, @poems and quotation from poetry
